title: Jundy's Emberling
description: Tiny vanilla friendly fire spirits that move into furnaces at night and smelt for you.
body:
Emberlings are tiny fire spirits that spawn in and around lava.

Hold a Blaze Rod to lure them. At night, if a furnace, smoker, or blast furnace is nearby, they slip inside and make it their home.

While inside, they act as infinite fuel during the night and keep smelting anything placed in the furnace.

Water and rain instantly snuff them out, so give them a roof or keep them indoors during storms.

This is my first mod. Thanks for the downloads!

Requires: NeoForge 1.21.1 and GeckoLib 4.7.6.
